; Fixture phase 2. Install only after human-reviewed visual/stability confirmation.
; Chiappa/Ferrari Sidebar fixture SHA-256: 06bf4c2777d5d4b15297f0d6370fb0352c2ca38098d440d7b7bd405a5384e793
VERSION 3.28.0.162
AFFECT [[4911547370760691430]]
    IMPORT net.asivery.AppLoad 1.0
    TRAVERSE [[3819512207256720568]] > [[14125623155555875541]]#[[15885405667098360701]] > [[5882927607508357618]]#lettersHomeLauncher
        REPLACE [[254542236275632405]] WITH {
            ~&254542236275632405&~: AppLoadLauncher.launchApplication("letters-home", [], {}, false)
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
